steps.title: Identify the time bridge needed
steps.content: The passage moves from a specific historical moment (1908, when Pasiphae was discovered) to the present state (eighty moons discovered now). The transition must connect this past point to the present.

steps.title: Apply the temporal signal
steps.content: ”To date” means “up to the present,” showing how discoveries accumulated from 1908 to now. The other three choices either restate prior information, treat eighty as an undefined example, or introduce a contrast not present. That matches Choice A — To date,.
